pageHeader.title: workflow instances
pageHeader.description: manage workflow bindings — link workflow templates with filled inputs

info.title: What is a Workflow Instance?
info.description: A Workflow Instance binds a workflow template to specific input values. When triggered, the workflow executes with those pre-configured inputs.

binding.title: Template Binding
binding.text: Link a workflow template with filled external inputs

inputs.title: Dynamic Inputs
inputs.text: Fill inputs defined by the workflow designer — strings, numbers, assets, etc.

trigger.title: Trigger Ready
trigger.text: Once created, instances are ready to be triggered by events, timers, or HTTP calls

reuse.title: Reusable
reuse.text: Create multiple instances from the same workflow with different input values

columns.name: name
columns.uniqueNoTooltip: Dynamic UUID — new ID per execution

empty.title: no instances found
empty.description: there are no workflow instances matching your current search criteria.

emptyState.title: no instances yet
emptyState.description: create your first workflow instance to bind a workflow template with input values

messages.confirmDelete: are you sure you want to delete the instance "{name}"?
